summary: Phase I (Digital Twin Issue Report PDF + Email) + 2 bug fixes (page_count validation, relaxed anchor delete permissions) tested end-to-end. 27/27 backend pytest tests pass (15 new Phase I + 12 updated Phase H). Frontend E2E flow verified: pin click -> thread modal -> Trimite raport -> issue report modal -> send -> success banner. POST /issue-report returned 200, banner shows 101 KB PDF with 3D capture and 2D extract. Preview endpoint returns inline application/pdf (3517 bytes, %PDF magic). No regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: test_phase_h_anchors.py contained an obsolete expectation (member 403 on delete and anchor on page=2 of single-page PDF). Updated to align with the two new bug fixes; both files now consistent.

preserveDrawingBuffer:true on three.js Canvas — confirmed in DigitalTwinViewer.jsx line 353. Screenshot capture chain wired via captureFnRef (useThree gl.domElement.toDataURL) -> onRequestScreenshot prop -> IssueReportModal. Working correctly per E2E (banner shows 'cu captură 3D').
test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io / Admin123!, client@propmanage.io / Client123!, specialist@propmanage.io / Spec123!, specialist2@propmanage.io / Spec123! (all working). Note: client@ does NOT have DT Pro, so all client subscription-gate tests assert 403 correctly.
seed_data_creation: Phase I tests create TEST_PhaseI_IssueReport project + multi-page (3p) plan + 2 pins + anchors; auto-cleaned via module-scoped fixture teardown. specialist2_session is granted DT Pro via admin endpoint to allow non-creator-member tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase I (Issue Report PDF + email + in-app notification) fully verified. Backend endpoints: POST /api/digital-twin/pins/{id}/issue-report and GET .../preview both working. Bug fixes confirmed: (1) plans now store page_count, anchor endpoint rejects page>page_count with 400 + 'Pagina X nu există'; (2) any project member (verified via _ensure_project_access) can delete anchors. Frontend selectors validated: dt-pin-issue-report-btn, dt-issue-report-modal, dt-report-recipient, dt-report-message, dt-report-preview, dt-report-send, dt-report-success. The pre-existing pin 37a5ee9d1c7b408fb2885259c7cef878 in project 51af6ced08b242b5ae06bd09de8f614e is a reliable test target for future regressions.

test_evidence.preview_curl: GET .../preview -> 200, Content-Type: application/pdf, Content-Disposition: inline, %PDF magic, 3517 bytes
test_evidence.success_banner_text: Raport trimis catre specialist@propmanage.io · 101 KB · cu captura 3D · cu extract 2D
